LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, TRACY MINICHIELLO, ROSANNA SANSOME'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2 TO PLEAD CONSPIRACY NOT AS A SEPARATE CAUSE OF ACTION BUT AS A BASIS FOR JOINT LIABILITY TO PLEAD ITS ELEMENTS, AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 AND 7. AS TO THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS TO PLEAD A BASIS FOR THEIR LIABILITY, AND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 8 TO PLEAD SOME WAY IN WHICH IT IS NOT SUBSUMED IN CAUSE OF ACTION 6. OVERRULED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 AND 4 AND AS TO THE REGENTS, CAUSES OF ACTION 3 AND 7. THE COURT ORDERED MR. PRATT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
